backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all core data types (Goal, Competency, PerformanceReview, etc.) and backend logic for a UniPlace Manager app, including role-based access control, goal/feedback/review management, and user profile storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—a deterministic Principal-to-5-digit-number utility and its display in UserProfileSection—to their respective source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose of each component, page, hook, and utility in the React application.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT.md: Deployment guide for UniPlace Manager on the Internet Computer via Caffeine.ai, covering the deployment process, user roles, first-time setup, and troubleshooting steps.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color tokens (background, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'UniPlace Manager — Placement Cell' and mounting the root React module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with login, admin, and assistant routes, wrapping the app in ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: Full-screen access denied UI component with an optional title, message, and a logout button that clears auth state and redirects to the login page.
frontend/src/components/common/AppLoadin: Simple full-screen loading spinner component displayed during app initialization or authentication checks.
frontend/src/components/common/EmptyStat: Reusable empty state component displaying an optional icon, title, description, and an action node when no data is available.
frontend/src/components/common/ErrorStat: Error display component using a destructive Alert with an optional retry button for surfacing error messages in the UI.
frontend/src/components/common/Skeletons: Collection of skeleton loading placeholder components (TableSkeleton, CardSkeleton, ChartSkeleton) used while data is being fetched.
frontend/src/components/common/UserProfi: Displays the authenticated user's profile card showing a shortened Principal ID with a copy-to-clipboard button and an 'Authenticated' badge.
frontend/src/components/layout/Dashboard: Provides the main dashboard layout with a fixed sidebar (logo, navigation, user dropdown) and a content area, handling logout by clearing identity and query cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBootstrapAdmin.ts: Exposes a mutation hook that calls the backend's bootstrapAdmin endpoint and invalidates role/profile queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: Fetches and exposes the current user's role, profile, and admin status via React Query, deriving a verification status enum from loading/error/data states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context provider and hook, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flows, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useLoginIntent.ts: Manages a sessionStorage-backed login intent ('admin' or 'assistant') with get, set, and clear helpers, syncing state across storage events.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend data operations including goals, competencies, skill ratings, performance reviews, feedback, development plans, and user profiles.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes (colors, sidebar, charts) using OKLCH color space, plus utility classes for translucent surfaces.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
Admin dashboard layout component with a sidebar navigation that switches between modules: Overview, Users & Roles, Goals, Reviews, Feedback, Competencies, Development Plans, and Analytics.
frontend/src/pages/admin/modules/AdminAn: Analytics module that fetches all goals and renders system-wide metrics as a pie chart (goal status distribution) and bar chart (goal progress distribution) using Recharts.
frontend/src/pages/admin/modules/AdminCo: Admin module for managing competencies and skills, allowing admins to list existing competencies and add new ones with assignment targeting (all members or specific principals) via a dialog form.
frontend/src/pages/admin/modules/AdminDe: Admin module for creating development plans and PIPs, supporting assignment to all members or specific members by principal ID, with a dialog form and due date input.
frontend/src/pages/admin/modules/AdminFe: Admin module for creating and submitting continuous feedback to all team members or specific members, using a dialog form with a comment textarea and assignment selector.
frontend/src/pages/admin/modules/AdminGo: Admin module for listing and creating goals with title, description, deadline, and assignment options, displaying goals with status badges and progress indicators.
frontend/src/pages/admin/modules/AdminOv: Admin dashboard overview page that displays summary stats (goals, reviews, competencies, completion rate) and a list of recent goals using data from multiple query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/admin/modules/AdminRe: Admin module that fetches and displays all submitted performance reviews with assignment badges, self-assessment, and manager assessment details.
frontend/src/pages/admin/modules/AdminUs: Admin module for assigning roles (admin or user) to principals by ID, alongside a reference card explaining the permissions for each role level.
frontend/src/pages/assistant/AssistantDa: Main dashboard layout for assistant users with a sidebar navigation that switches between Overview, Goals, Reviews, Feedback, Skills, and Development Plan tabs.
frontend/src/pages/assistant/modules/MyC: Displays competencies assigned to all members or specifically to the user, allowing them to rate each skill 1–5 stars using interactive star buttons.
frontend/src/pages/assistant/modules/MyD: Shows development plans assigned to all members or individually to the user, displaying each plan's description, status badge, and due date.
frontend/src/pages/assistant/modules/MyF: Manages received and sent feedback with tabs, and provides a dialog form to submit new feedback to a specific recipient with assignment mode options.
frontend/src/pages/assistant/modules/MyG: Lists goals assigned to all members or specifically to the user, with progress bars and a dropdown to update goal progress and status.
frontend/src/pages/assistant/modules/MyO: Summary dashboard showing stats cards for total goals, reviews submitted, and average progress, plus a list of the user's active goals with progress indicators.
frontend/src/pages/assistant/modules/MyR: React module for viewing and submitting performance reviews, supporting assignment to all members or specific principals via a dialog form.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page component that handles Internet Identity authentication, bootstrap admin flow for first-time setup, role verification, and redirects users based on their assigned role.
frontend/src/routes/RequireAuth.tsx: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users or those without a login intent to the home page, showing a loading screen during initialization.
frontend/src/routes/RequireRole.tsx: Route guard component that enforces role-based access control, showing access-denied screens for unassigned, mismatched, or insufficient roles.
frontend/src/utils/authMessages.ts: Centralized constants for user-facing authentication and authorization error messages used across login and access-denied screens.
frontend/src/utils/branding.ts: Centralized branding constants (app name, system label) for the UniPlace Manager frontend.
frontend/src/utils/principals.ts: Utility functions for parsing, validating, formatting, and hashing ICP Principal IDs, including converting a principal to a deterministic 5-digit numeric string.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and accordion animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features, pending feature requests, and architectural notes for the UniPlace Manager app, currently focused on displaying a deterministic 5-digit Principal ID in the user profile.
